2603.14876.title: A Hybrid AI and Rule-Based Decision Support System for Disease Diagnosis and Management Using Labs
2603.14876.paper_summary: This research paper outlines the development and implementation of a novel Clinical Decision Support System (CDSS) that integrates AI predictive modeling with medical knowledge bases. It utilizes the quantifiable information elements in lab results for inferring likely diagnoses a patient might have. Subsequently, suggesting investigations to confirm the likely diagnoses -- an assistive tool for physicians. The system fuses knowledge contained in a rule-base expert system with inferences of data driven predictors based on the features in labs. The data for 593,055 patients was collected from 547 primary care centers across the US to model our decision support system and derive Real-Word Evidence (RWE) to make it relevant for a large demographic of patients. Our Rule-Base comprises clinically validated rules, modeling 59 health conditions that can directly confirm one or more of diseases and assign ICD-10 codes to them. The Likely Diagnosis system uses multi-class classification, covering 37 ICD-10 codes, which are grouped together into 11 categories based on the labs that physicians prescribe to confirm the diagnosis. This research offers a novel system that assists a physician by utilizing medical profile of a patient and routine lab investigations to predict a group of likely diseases and then confirm them, coupled with providing explanations for inferences, thereby assisting physicians to reduce misdiagnosis of patients in clinical decision-making.
2603.14876.paper_summary_zh: 這篇研究論文概述了一個新型臨床決策支持系統（CDSS）的開發和實施，該系統將人工智慧預測建模與醫學知識庫整合在一起。<lb/>它利用實驗室結果中的可量化信息元素來推斷患者可能擁有的診斷。<lb/>隨後，建議進行檢查以確認可能的診斷——這是一種對醫生的輔助工具。<lb/>該系統融合了基於規則的專家系統中的知識與基於實驗室特徵的數據驅動預測器的推斷。<lb/>我們從美國547個初級保健中心收集了593,055名患者的數據，以建模我們的決策支持系統並推導出實證證據（RWE），使其對大量患者的相關性增強。<lb/>我們的基於規則的系統包含臨床驗證的規則，建模59種健康狀況，這些狀況可以直接確認一種或多種疾病並為其分配ICD-10代碼。<lb/>可能診斷系統使用多類別分類，涵蓋37個ICD-10代碼，這些代碼根據醫生開立的實驗室檢查以確認診斷而分為11類。<lb/>這項研究提供了一個新系統，通過利用患者的醫療檔案和常規實驗室檢查來預測一組可能的疾病，然後確認這些疾病，並提供推斷的解釋，從而幫助醫生減少臨床決策中的誤診。
2603.14876.author: Muhammad Hammad Maqsood et.al.
2603.14876.authors: Muhammad Hammad Maqsood, Mubashir Sajid, Khubaib Ahmed, Muhammad Usamah Shahid, Muddassar Farooq
